title: gonolobus lewisii
intro: Gonolobus lewisii, also known as Lewis' gourd or the climbing milkweed vine, is a type of flowering plant in the milkweed family (Apocynaceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Gonolobus lewisii include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified herbalist or healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
